requirements_document:
Product Requirements: E-Commerce Checkout System

## User Authentication
- Users must be logged in to checkout
- Guest checkout should be available for faster purchases
- All purchases require user authentication for security

## Payment Processing
- Support credit cards, debit cards, and PayPal
- Payment processing must complete within 3 seconds
- Complex fraud detection may take up to 10 seconds
- Store payment methods for future use
- Never store credit card information (PCI compliance)

## Shipping Options
- Offer standard (5-7 days) and express (2-3 days) shipping
- Free shipping on orders over $50
- Express shipping is always $15
- Free express shipping for premium members

## Inventory Management
- Reserve items in cart for 15 minutes
- Items should remain in cart indefinitely until checkout
- Real-time inventory updates
- Allow overselling by 10% to maximize revenue
- Never oversell to maintain customer trust

## Order Confirmation
- Send email confirmation immediately
- Email should include tracking number
- Tracking numbers generated 24 hours after order
- SMS confirmation for all orders
- SMS only for orders over $100

## Return Policy
- 30-day return window
- Electronics have 14-day return window
- All items eligible for return within 30 days
